name: Mission Control Maintenance
description: Daily at 11:00 PM - Update all Mission Control dashboards with current data from workspace files. Git commit and push to trigger automatic Vercel deployment.

name: Daily Research Briefing
description: Weekdays at 9:00 AM - Monitor Reddit communities (r/Peptides, r/Biohackers, r/Nootropics), check competitor websites, identify product opportunities, assess sprint progress, flag blocked tasks.

name: Midday Operations Check
description: Daily at 12:00 PM - Brief check for critical issues: cash position alerts, low inventory warnings, overdue payables, blocked tasks stuck 3+ days. Only reports if issues found.
deliverables: Critical issue alerts or all-clear confirmation

name: Weekly Compliance Sweep
description: Fridays at 3:00 PM - Scan elixserpeptides.com for compliance violations. Check against COMPLIANCE.md rules: no human dosing instructions, no 'use this to heal' language, research-only framing.

name: Weekly Intelligence Brief
description: Fridays at 4:00 PM - Compile weekly learning from all team members, strategic insights, recommended actions, new opportunities identified, risks to monitor.

name: Weekly Financial Briefing
description: Mondays at 8:00 AM - Read financial data from Google Sheet (READ-ONLY), analyze cash position, runway, payables due, inventory alerts, revenue trends vs targets.
